title: Author EncumbrancePressureLevel ordinality table — typed enum (idle / light / moderate / heavy / at-ceiling / over-ceiling)
description:
Per [[substrate-sync-cost-pattern-2026-05-26]] Layer 5. Typed ordinality table classifying session encumbrance pressure. Proposed cases with FROZEN ordinals per [[ordinality-table-entries-immutable-once-released]]: `0 = idle` (< 20%) / `1 = light` (20-50%) / `2 = moderate` (50-75%) / `3 = heavy` (75-90%) / `4 = atCeiling` (90-100%) / `5 = overCeiling` (>100%). Each row carries: slug, displayName, lowerBoundPercent, upperBoundPercent, substratePolicyResponse (typed enum: normal / confirm-acquisitions / warn-on-acquire / auto-discharge-unused / auto-trigger-winddown / refuse-new-work), description. Locked at first commit per ordinality-immutability discipline. NOT a hard cap on substrate operations — it's a typed-level for substrate-policy decisions (consistent with [[agent-abilities-pokemon-mechanics-with-topology-2026-05-26]] no-hard-budget-just-warnings).

## Composes with existing types (per [[cost-model-non-divergence-discipline]])

- (no direct composition — NEW typed catalog) — but transitions trigger InferenceCircuitBreaker policy logic at runtime per wire-substrate-policy-responses-to-encumbrance-levels
